title: A U.S. Independence Celebration Damaged a Museum in Belgium
summary_full: There were black marks left on a structure in a central Brussels park after a fireworks display, the American ambassador to Belgium confirmed.
summary_public: There were black marks left on a structure in a central Brussels park after a fireworks display, the American ambassador to Belgium confirmed.
